mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (household_id, email, password, name, phone, role, status, created_at) VALUES (#{householdId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, 'RESIDENT', 'PENDING', NOW())
INSERT INTO user (email, password, name, role, status, provider, provider_id, created_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{status}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, household_id, email, password, name, phone, role, status, approved_by, approved_at, provider, provider_id, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT u.user_id, u.email, u.name, u.phone, u.role, u.status, u.household_id, h.dong, h.ho, u.provider FROM user u LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_id, refresh_token, expired_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiredAt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT token_id, user_id, refresh_token, expired_at, created_at FROM refresh_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
